# task-file-peek

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Right-panel preview for files referenced from a task description. Reads filePath from the task-detail file-peek context.
- Contributes:
  - `TaskDetailSlots.SidePanel` → `TaskFilePeek`
